study_set.name: Anaerobic fermentation bioreactor microbial communities from Madison, Wisconsin, United States
study_set.description: The goal of this study is to characterize a central set of genes relevant to medium chain fatty acid (MCFA) production to guide screens of putative MCFA-producing microorganisms from additional environments or grown on different substrates
study_set.title: Anaerobic fermentation bioreactor microbial communities from Madison, Wisconsin, United States
